mood: Clean, airy, purposeful. Nutrition is front and centre but without clinical coldness — think premium supplement meets fresh café.
photography: Solo, active contexts: clean desk setups, post-run outdoors, light café corners. Natural backgrounds, good light. Never a bar, party, brunch spread, or staged group shot.
typographyDirection: Didot for the hero wordmark (premium, clean), Montserrat for stats and body (clear, functional), Bebas Neue for callout badges. Brittany Signature only for the tagline — never for nutritional info.
rejectLooks: Neon or metallic energy drink cues
